summary: First end-to-end smoke test of Geeta Wisdom app. Backend (4/4 endpoints) and Frontend (home, shloka generation, audio TTS, favorites localStorage, /favorites page, /history page) all working end-to-end. Claude Sonnet 4.5 returns valid Devanagari shloka (BG 2.47 for career anxiety). ElevenLabs TTS returns ~67KB base64 mp3 and play button transitions Listen->Pause. Favorites and history persist and render correctly.
passed: POST /api/shloka/generate (valid) -> 200 with all 11 fields; sanskrit contains Devanagari (79 chars)
Home page renders hero 'Wherever you stand', situation-input textarea, submit-situation-btn
Submit flow displays ShlokaCard with shloka-sanskrit/hindi/english/guidance testids populated
play-audio-btn transitions from 'Listen in Sanskrit' to 'Pause recitation' after TTS resolves
/favorites renders favorites-list with the saved verse
/history renders history-list with the just-generated verse

failed.issue: Selector [data-testid^="suggestion-chip"] matched 0 elements. Chips may use a different data-testid pattern (e.g. plain text buttons). Did not block flow since manual textarea fill worked.
failed.evidence: Suggestion chips count: 0 in playwright run

action_items: (Optional) Confirm/add data-testid='suggestion-chip-{i}' on suggestion chips for future automated tests
